title: Profile and fuse Future-KL ratio metrics
summary: Benchmarked the filtered quantile-heavy ratio metric block and replaced the duplicated scalar-metric path with the fused helper.
success_gate: Show the metric helper matches the old quantile path and wins on the representative Future-KL metric shape.

results.note: The helper now accepts clip_ratio_c and is wired into compute_policy_loss_future_kl. This keeps the loss math unchanged and optimizes detached scalar metrics only.
